title: Formation Flight archive-only c18 source residual covariance selector
scientificQuestion: Is the persistent c18 h-linear source residual sufficiently concentrated in one stable D3Q19 direction and additive source component to justify exactly one focused temporal trace?

rationale.why: The three-offset exact-source mean remains mixed at curvature 0.59595 while maximum source phase spread is only 1.3844 percent. More offsets or a power map have low information value; the archived direction/component residuals can identify whether one focused trace is scientifically justified without executing fluid timesteps.
rationale.roi: This analysis reuses nine locked source censuses, executes zero CFD, and can either select one high-yield c18 temporal trace or reject a diffuse trace before another approximately 15-minute c18 run.

residualDefinition.component: R_k,p(q) uses the identical h-linear residual for reflected momentum exchange, interpolation auxiliary, or moving wall
residualDefinition.phaseMean: arithmetic mean of R over the three deterministic offsets
residualDefinition.additiveClosure: R_source equals the sum of the three component residuals within the frozen absolute tolerance

selectionRule.positiveAlignmentLedger: sum over moving directions and components of max(systematicAlignment, 0)
selectionRule.centeredPhaseCovariance: directionWeight(q) * mean_p[(R_component,p(q) - mean R_component(q)) * (R_source,p(q) - mean R_source(q))]
selectionRule.signAgreement: number of offsets where R_component,p(q) * R_source,p(q) is positive
selectionRule.ranking: descending positive systematic alignment, then descending sign agreement count, then component order [reflected, interpolation, moving wall], then ascending D3Q19 direction index
selectionRule.thresholdBasis: A uniform ledger over three components and 18 moving directions gives 1.85 percent per cell. Requiring 10 percent demands more than 5.4 times uniform concentration; two-of-three sign agreement prevents a phase-fragile one-off from authorizing a trace.
selectionRule.traceOffsetSelection: For the selected component/direction, choose the offset with maximum signed local alignment directionWeight * R_component * R_source; break ties by offset order.

classifications.concentratedStableTraceSelected: top positive alignment share is at least 10 percent, sign agreement is at least two of three offsets, and the direction is moving
classifications.concentratedPhaseFragile: top share clears 10 percent but sign agreement fails
classifications.diffuseResidualNoSingleTrace: no moving component/direction clears the concentration requirement

nextActions.concentratedStableTraceSelected: preregister exactly one c18 production-TRT temporal trace for the selected owner, component, direction, and subcell offset; capture the final cycle without changing collision, boundary, or force physics
nextActions.concentratedPhaseFragile: do not run a temporal trace; group archived residuals by opposite direction pair and source component before any new CFD
nextActions.diffuseResidualNoSingleTrace: do not run a temporal trace; group archived residuals by opposite direction pair and source component before any new CFD

claimBoundary: This archive-only selector can authorize at most one diagnostic c18 temporal trace. It cannot establish source convergence, formation-power convergence, quantitative formation benefit, a production correction, measured-bird formation flight, or a biological claim.
